title.value: SurveyX: Academic Survey Automation via Large Language Models
title.evidence: SurveyX: Academic Survey Automation via Large Language Models

value: SurveyX significantly enhances the efficacy of survey composition by decomposing the process into Preparation and Generation phases.
The introduction of online reference retrieval and the AttributeTree preprocessing method improves the quality of generated surveys.
SurveyX outperforms existing automated survey generation systems in both content quality and citation quality, approaching human expert performance.
insights.evidence: Experimental evaluation results show that SurveyX outperforms existing automated survey generation systems in content quality (0.259 improvement) and citation quality (1.76 enhancement), approaching human expert performance across multiple evaluation dimensions.

research_background.value: The exponential growth of literature has made it increasingly challenging for researchers to comprehend technological evolution and developmental trajectories of specific subfields.
research_background.evidence: The exponential growth of literature has made it increasingly challenging for researchers attempting to comprehend the technological evolution and developmental trajectories of specific subfields from the ground up.

main_contributions.value: SurveyX proposes an efficient reference retrieval algorithm, a reference pre-processing method called AttributeTree, and an outline generation method named Outline Optimization.
main_contributions.evidence: To sum up, our main contributions are as follows: We propose an efficient reference retrieval algorithm capable of expanding keywords based on a given topic... We design a reference pre-processing method called AttributeTree, which efficiently extracts key information from documents... We introduce an outline generation method named Outline Optimization.

core_approach.value: SurveyX divides the survey composing process into two phases: the Preparation Phase and the Generation Phase.
core_approach.evidence: To address these deficiencies, we propose SurveyX, an efficient and well organized system for automated survey generation. SurveyX divides the composing process of surveys into two phases: the Preparation Phase and the Generation Phase.

reference_acquisition.value: The retrieval data source includes both offline and online data sources, with a self-developed crawler system based on Google Scholar for online references.
reference_acquisition.evidence: The retrieval data source includes both offline and online data sources. The offline data source consists of 2,632,189 available papers downloaded from the arXiv.org, with new papers added daily. The online data source is a self-developed crawler system based on Google Scholar.

retrieval_algorithms.value: The retrieval algorithm consists of a two-step process: reference recall and reference filter.
retrieval_algorithms.evidence: The retrieval algorithm is divided into two steps: reference recall and reference filter.

reference_preprocessing.value: AttributeTree is used to distill key information from references to construct a reference materials database.
reference_preprocessing.evidence: We have designed a reference pre-processing method called AttributeTree, which efficiently extracts key information from documents.

outline_generation.value: Outline Optimization generates outlines based on hints from the attribute tree to guide the writing process.
outline_generation.evidence: We designed an outline generation method named Outline Optimization, which generates outlines based on hints and employs a 'separate-then-reorganize' step to eliminate redundancy.

content_generation.value: The main body content is generated using hints derived from the secondary outline.
content_generation.evidence: During the content generation stage, inspired by the human writing process for surveys, we continue to use the hint-based method employed during the outline generation stage to enhance the depth of the generated content.

post_optimization.value: The post refinement stage includes a RAG-based rewriting module and a figure and table generation module.
post_optimization.evidence: We have constructed a comprehensive and systematic post refinement stage that significantly enhances the overall quality of the generated survey while expanding its expressive format.
